prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild dormitory, Haru Mistfell (androgynous crafter, apron, tool belt, ash-marked gloves) struggles to hold a violently flickering, erratic mana crystal emitting blue sparks; Haru Starling (androgynous mage, blue layered robes, floating spell tags) enters the frame, reaching out to assist with a focused expression; cinematic lighting, stable camera, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild dormitory shot; Haru Starling places their hands gently over Haru Mistfell's hands holding the mana crystal, channeling calm, steady blue energy that suppresses the erratic flickering; both agents maintain focused, cooperative postures as the room light stabilizes; cinematic style, consistent character appearance, no text, no watermark.
